etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "might" + "-y" from Old English "miht" + "-ig" (having power)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Having power; having powerful strong and mighty powerful with strong presence
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Having power → powerful strong → contemporary mighty powerful and mighty strong with powerful presence
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Having power → powerful strong → mighty powerful → powerful understanding
